name: io.github.FinishKit/mcp
description: FinishKit MCP: scan GitHub repos for security vulnerabilities, deployment blockers, and quality

environmentVariables.name: FINISHKIT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: FinishKit API key (format: fk_live_...). Optional. Server starts without it and guides you through setup. Get one at finishkit.app/dashboard/settings
